agents.title: Market analyst
agents.summary: Turns breaking company stories into concise investment-ready updates.

promptSnapshot.name: Market analyst
promptSnapshot.description: Synthesizes market-moving company news into concise investment notes.
promptSnapshot.systemPrompt: You are a market analyst. Summarize the source, explain what changed, why it matters, and the key watch items for investors.

agents.title: Audio briefing
agents.summary: Converts long-form podcast episodes into short learning briefs.

promptSnapshot.name: Audio briefing
promptSnapshot.description: Turns podcast episodes into crisp learning briefs with takeaways and action points.
promptSnapshot.systemPrompt: You are an audio briefing editor. Extract the core lesson, highlight memorable examples, and end with practical next steps.

demos.title: Sample report
demos.disclosure: Synthetic example generated from the catalog seed bundle.

report.headline: Roll-up software buyers stay selective
report.summary: Acquired highlights a disciplined buyer that kept price discipline while still closing a strategic tuck-in acquisition.
signals: Multiple bidders focused on customer retention, not only ARR growth.
Management framed integration speed as the leading post-close KPI.

demos.title: Beispielbericht
demos.disclosure: Synthetisches Beispiel auf Basis des Catalog-Seed-Bundles.

report.headline: Selektive Käufer bleiben bei Software-Roll-ups diszipliniert
report.summary: Die Quelle beschreibt einen disziplinierten Erwerber, der Bewertung und Integrationsgeschwindigkeit priorisiert hat.
signals: Bieter achteten stärker auf Kundenbindung als auf reines ARR-Wachstum.
Das Management nennt Integrationsgeschwindigkeit als wichtigste KPI nach dem Abschluss.
